name: Ben
description: Physical Appearance — Ben is a broad-shouldered man in his mid-40s with a mechanic's build and calloused hands. Dark hair, receding slightly. His face is almost always unshaven, heavy around the eyes with deep-set, tired eyes and a strong jaw. His jaw often works with suppressed emotion. His hands shake noticeably at key moments — when handling the revolver, when trying his house key in the door.

name: The Waif
description: Physical Appearance — Waif is a wiry, thin woman — "skin and bones" — roughly the same build and size as Ben's ex-wife Marie. She is perpetually dirty and disheveled throughout much of the story: her skin is visibly grimy, her fingers stained, her feet filthy with black-painted toenails and scratches running up her legs. Her eyes are dark-circled and haunted, often described as dark-eyed or dead-e

name: Marie
description: Physical Appearance — Marie is in her late 30s to early 40s, with an average, practical build. She has dark brown hair worn at a practical length — usually shoulder-length or tied back — and an intelligent, weary face marked by deep grief that she has learned to carry. In the parallel-world timeline (where the accident never happened), she is slightly fuller, less haunted, but still carries a cert

name: Jack
description: Physical Appearance — Jack is six years old, small and slight as children are, with the unformed features of early childhood. He has a quality of alertness that borders on the unnerving — his eyes catch reflections that adults miss, and he notices things in mirrors that shouldn't be there. In the car accident flashback, his injuries are devastating: his head is bisected, one eye still moving in id

name: The Mother
description: Physical Appearance — The Mother appears as a woman in her 50s with wild, greasy hair that hangs over her face. She has a solid, formidable build — not tall but dense and unnaturally strong. Her face, when visible through her hair, has a weathered quality; her mouth can open *impossibly wide*, far beyond human jaw anatomy. Her hands are the primary instrument of her violence — strong enough to sma

name: Woman in White
description: Physical Appearance — The Woman in White is a pale, ethereal figure — feminine in shape but profoundly unnatural in form and function. Her most distinctive feature is her feet: grimy, bare, with prominent bony ankles that trail the hem of her white dress. Her hands are wiry — thin, strong, skeletal — and her fingers can extend into sharp elongated razor-like implements capable of slicing through a

name: The Others
description: Physical Appearance — The Others are pale, ethereal figures — their faces are blank, featureless or nearly so, without recognizable human expression. They are lit by pale fire — a cold, blue light that illuminates their forms from within or from the ambient supernatural flames that surround them. They are described as hollow husks — their bodies contain no substance. When a bullet catches one in t

name: The Man
description: Physical Appearance — The Man appears exclusively in flashback and is primarily defined by silhouette and context rather than detailed features. He is an older man — presumably in his 50s or 60s, established enough to occupy a corner office or penthouse with a glass wall overlooking New York City. In his first appearance, he is a dark, backlit figure — his face obscured by shadow, his form silhoue

name: The Cabin
description: ### Exterior The cabin is clad in cedar siding, the wood weathered and browned "like old pennies" — a warm, aged patina that speaks to years of lake winters and forest summers. The roof is pitched, the structure modest but solid. The windows are fitted with internal wooden shutters reinforced behind glass with metal bars — a dual defense system that reads initially as rustic security but takes on

name: The Intersection
description: ### The Crossroads A busy urban or suburban crossroads of multiple lanes — a place of constant traffic flow where vehicles stack at red lights and surge through green ones. The intersection is not visually remarkable: no distinctive landmarks, no iconic architecture, no feature that would make it memorable to a casual observer. It is resolutely ordinary — and that ordinariness is the point. This c
